channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Speed Bumps have several large pot holes, 26th April
item.description:
The speed bumps in Ctonwelk Avenue have several large holes in them and I’ve damaged my tyres twice. Any chance they are repaired asap? Thank you .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Cromwell Avenue, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Abandoned car, 26th April
item.description:
White car numberplate HG13 GGK has been there for months. Mould growing inside of vehicle - has clearly been dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Gipsy Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped beds on pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped 2 large beds outside sky house overnight on Saturday 25 April. On the corner of Sundorne Road and Priolo Road - SE7 7PP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priolo Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cleaned up my community, 26th April
item.description:
Cleaned up after evidently incapable council cleaners after the useless marathon of waste. Are companies producing all this plastic held accountable? And by the way, can we negotiate a council tax discount for me please as I do so much of the council’s job?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Poet's Bridge, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour leaving rubbish out, 26th April
item.description:
Neighbour has been leaving this opposite my house. Tried to add a mattress and I’ve sent it back to them. They are number 22 I believe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Plough Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Largest dent in the middle of the pavement., 26th April
item.description:
The concrete is eroding and dent is getting bigger.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heath Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress left on path, 26th April
item.description:
Someone’s dirty stinking mattress dumped in Linton close this looks like a serious health hazard and needs dealing with asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linton Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor surface, 26th April
item.description:
Road is very bad dangerous and getting worse you cannot avoid the damage!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixham Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recurring junk car advert on sign post, 26th April
item.description:
Please remove this occurs every 6 months. Lamppost at end of Shafton road junction victoria park road e9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shafton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worn out 20 mph speed roundel, 26th April
item.description:
The 20 speed marking is worn out in FAIRFIELD ROAD- Also it would be beneficial if TFL put up an additional speed signage on the side of road on BOW ROAD that vehicles travelling towards BOW roundabout as the speed signage on the post is on the other side of the road.The more speed signage the less drivers would be speeding.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127-139, Bow Road, Bow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights out, 26th April
item.description:
4 lampposts lights still not working at night, very dangerous when leaving David Lloyd club at night !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Baugh Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish outside flats, 26th April
item.description:
Carpet amongst other rubbish has been left outside the flats on Green Lane near Park View and needs removing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 Edge Hill, 26th April
item.description:
Not sure what’s worse, all the vehicles parked along the road rammed full of household clearance items, the 30 or so bicycles for sale, chained to council property namely the railings OR the councils attitude towards dealing with the problem. So many reports have been sent in and yet over time the council advise the matters in hand and the report closed 😱 But how is it being dealt with? Nothing obvious happening on site. Get the rubbish moved - its all on vehicles so get the owner to drive it to the dump
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edge Hill, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in Larkhall park, 26th April
item.description:
Playgrounds covered in litter again as usual

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courland Grove, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 26th April
item.description:
Good day. I've immigrated from South Africa. One of the things I was looking forward to moving to England was cleaner streets. There is trash everywhere along the main street by plumbstead road, the bus stops and towards the train station. There is no pride for the neighbourhood. Walking home I must navigate through papers and cans. Why is this being allowed? I'd happily organise a cleanup crew and do a neighbourhood cleanup if you could put me in touch with the correct people please? This is just not what I would expect from 'the best city in the world' in a 1st world country. It's heartbreaking we shouldn't live like this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cooker dumped on the pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Been there a couple of days
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swingate Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti on cabinet, 26th April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Cutcombe Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
